transcript.text:
[America's Top 3 Pizzas All At Once?]
[The size is something else...]
[New York Pizza]
[Not all pizzas are round!
[Detroit Pizza]
[This is for all cheese lovers]
[That thickness...]
[Chicago Pizza]
[Have you heard of New. De. Chi? (New Dish)]
[Let's get into it!]
Hello everyone
I'm at Magok to eat some pizza
This place has all 3 styles of pizza New York, Detroit, and Chicago
I will eat all 3 of them
Over here!
[Bigstar Pizza] [Seoul, Gangseo-gu]

[Finally here?]
[Actor Kim Woo Bin is the brand model here]
I love it
[Why do you eat so much?]
[It makes me want to protect you...]
Hello What would you like to order?
3 styles of pizza, right?
Yes, we have the New York pizza, Detroit pizza, and the Chicago pizza
What are the differences?
New York Pizza is just really big
[You would have to fold it]
Chicago pizza has a lot of cheese
-The thick one, right? -Yes
Detroit pizza is shaped differently It's rectangle
The outside crust is the best part
Kim Woo Bin's favorite is the Ragù Meatball Chicago Pizza

I will need to order that then
Well then
The Ragù Meatball Pizza,
-The Lasagna Chicago Pizza is good too -I'll take that too then
Pepperoni Detroit Pizza,
Which toppings for New York?
There are a lot of toppings, so it'll be hard to pick
I might want half & half then
We do half & half, but we also do Quarters too
Divided into quarters?!
Cuatro Premium is popular
Triple X Large?
How big is that?
45cm (18in) in diameter
About this big?
That's really big

You can have a photo of Kim Woo Bin this big if you order this size
I'll take the Cuatro Premium then
Spicy rice cake...
-We have it here -I'll take that
Since you ordered all 3 types of pizzas here,
We call that New Dish (New, De, Chi)
The first syllables of those 3 pizzas
You can enjoy that here only at Bigstar Pizza
[Happy]
You can look around and hang out with Mr. Woo Bin while you wait
Okay I got you
[Getting nervous just by looking at him]
Thank you
The Chicago Pizza has a lot of cheese
Detroit Pizza looks different
The crust is very delicious It's the best part

-Enjoy -Thank you
Chicago pizza looks small, but it has a lot of cheese inside
And this is...
This pizza is huge
What should I eat first?
Try the Lasagna Chicago Pizza first
-This one? -Yes
This is the Lasagna Okay
This is their most popular pizza Chicago style
Bon appetit
[Let's get that cheese pull]
This looks delicious Look how thick it is
This tastes like a regular pizza sauce But it's very fruity
There's this really fruity scent to it Makes it more appetizing
This is no joke
Is this cheese crust?

There's cheese inside the crust
I have to dip it in the garlic sauce
It's a regular pizza with no toppings
But the sauce and cheese makes up for everything
I've been wanting to try this Det.. dest?
Destroi?
Detroit, right?
[Come on!]
Detroit style pizza He said the crust tastes good
I can taste the dough
Maybe because it was after this?
The dough tastes really good
The outside is very...
[Loading...]
Chewy
Nothing like a regular pizza

Delicious
It has jalapeños
Gives a refreshing taste
Crispy and chewy
It's like eating a delicious pastry
It's good
He said this is spicy
That's spicy
So flavorful
[Not too spicy?]
I really love sweet potato pizza
That size
Sweet potato mousse
So good
Sweet potato and ham But the mousse is so good!
The bottom is thin and crispy

This part is chewy
Dip it in pasta sauce
Love this combination
I keep thinking about my bangs...
First time ever doing this hairstyle since middle school And it's ruined
It's like sphynx...
Chleopatra?
This one next
Cheddar cheese on top
This is their new item
As you can see here
Ragù sauce and meatballs I remembered!
That's really good
[Eyebrows of truth]
The sauce itself is really good
The combination of the toppings is really important

The meatballs, ragù sauce, and cheddar cheese go really well together
They belong together?
What am I saying?
This one! What is this?
Which one is this?
Cheddar explosion bacon pizza
This one also has cheddar cheese on top
This is a double pepperoni over here
This is bulgogi meat pizza
It has Jack Daniel sauce so you will be able to taste the difference in quality of the sauce
So detailed
I just wanted to know the name
Thank you
The flavors of cheddar cheese is really deep
It usually takes me about 4 bites for slice of pizza
But this...

Let's fold it
Can't do it
The amount of food that goes in 1 bite is different
I wish it was a little warm
Like 30~40 seconds in the microwave...
[What are they bringing in?]
[Your wish is my command]
Thank you
If you reheat it, it's like a fresh slice of pizza
[Checking if it works]
[It works!]
This one was good Let's eat 1 more
Comes off easier than I thought
This is so convenient
No dine-ins, right?
This location is delivery & pick-up only

There are other locations that do dine-ins
So I guess I'll be the only one asking for a microwave
It's way too hot Wait...
1 bite of rice cake
How's the sauce this tasty?
The pizza slices are much bigger than regular ones
It's so thick
We are the only franchise here that sells the rectangular Detroit pizzas
Char-grilled bulgogi pizza
Just 40 seconds
It smells amazing
This is so good
The smokey flavors
Sweet and yummy
It's refreshing
It has lemon zest

Really refreshing
This place would be great for a house party
Many people can enjoy lots of different types of pizza And they're big!
This is really tasty
It's not a regular tomato sauce It has ground beef
Feels like a pasta
[Some beverages on the house]
[Plum juice just for Tzuyang]
We cater accordingly
This one's really good
This one's so good
I love having the microwave
Should I carry 1 around for mukbang?
The crust is really interesting I've never had anything like it
Hot
Tasty

Meatball
The Lasagna Pizza is their most popular pizza It's really good, but
I prefer the Ragù Meatball Pizza more The meatball is amazing
This looks like a cartoon pizza
[I've seen her from somewhere...]
[Aunt Tzuyang?]
Say hello
Hello
[I want to stay and watch]
[So cute...]
One of each left
Which one to eat?
Lasagna
It was very eye-opening when I first had Chicago-style pizza
Meatball and cheddar cheese taste really good together
Like hamburg steak (salisbury steak)

[What happened...?]
I confused my tongue with the meatball
[Bleeding]
I bit it good
It tastes like blood
It hurts
One last slice
This one is really good I saved it for last
Really delicious
The smokiness is great
I had some pizza today
It was really good
I would be really great to order a variety for a house party with your friends and family
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
